# FastAPI Template

> FastAPI Template is a production-ready backend starter using FastAPI, async SQLAlchemy, PostgreSQL, Redis, and layered architecture. The project currently runs a versioned API surface mounted under /v1 and /v2 with per-version OpenAPI/Swagger/ReDoc endpoints. This repository is in active backend development with strong test coverage and explicit service/repository boundaries.

## Core Documentation
- [Architecture Overview](architecture/overview.md): Current system design, components, middleware, and versioned API routing
- [Getting Started](guides/getting-started.md): Prerequisites, environment setup, install, migrations, and first run
- [Development](guides/development.md): Daily workflow, branching, commits, lint, format, and testing
- [Contributing](guides/contributing.md): Code standards, PR checklist, review expectations
- [API Reference](api/reference.md): Endpoints, auth, versioning, and error model

## Strategy
- [Vision](strategy/vision.md): Problem, target users, success metrics, and constraints
- [Roadmap](strategy/roadmap.md): Milestones, priorities, and near-term plan
- [Decisions Log](strategy/decisions-log.md): Product and delivery decisions over time

## Optional
- [Deployment](guides/deployment.md): Environments, deployment steps, rollback, and health checks
- [Changelog](changelog/CHANGELOG.md): Keep a Changelog history with unreleased changes
- [Runbooks](runbooks/): Operational playbooks for repeated production tasks
- [ADRs](architecture/decisions/): Architecture Decision Records
